message:
refactor(codegen): Migrate contextvars, cmath, calendar, copyreg to ZigBuilder

- contextvars_mod.zig: Migrate genContextVar to use emitInlineBlockStart/End
- cmath_mod.zig: Migrate genSqrt to use emitInlineBlockStart/End
- calendar_mod.zig: Migrate genLeapdays, genWeekday, genMonthrange to builder
- copyreg_mod.zig: Migrate genNewobj, genNewobjEx to use emitInlineBlockStart/End

Progress: 35 files remaining
